body:
# Description

Cancelled by the 2026-04 pre-ACP archive pass. The Discord overlay line was superseded and archived.


# [PKT-DSC-004](task-0150): Lifecycle/Migration Notices

## Purpose

Implement Discord lifecycle/migration notices.

## Scope

- Notice format
- Publishing logic
- Triggering

## Implementation

1. Define format
2. Implement publishing
3. Add triggering

## Acceptance Criteria

1. Format defined
2. Publishing works
3. Triggered correctly
